settings.title: Settings

settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.privacy.heading: Our Privacy Commitment
settings.privacy.noCollection: We do not collect personal information or sell your data
settings.privacy.locationDisplay: Location data is used only for map display and is never stored on our servers
settings.privacy.localOnly: All photo processing happens locally on your device
settings.privacy.noTracking: We use anonymous page-view analytics (Google Analytics) to improve the app — no personal data is shared
map.announcement.title: What's New
map.announcement.body: Welcome to Locusify! Upload your GPS-tagged photos to generate visual route maps and cinematic travel vlogs automatically.
share.appText: Transform your travel photos into visual route maps and cinematic vlogs
share.videoText: Check out my travel trajectory replay!
guide.step1.title: Upload Photos
guide.step1.description: Tap the + button in the bottom-right corner to add GPS-tagged photos to the map
guide.step2.title: Quick Add Photos
guide.step2.description.desktop: You can also right-click anywhere on the map to quickly add photos to that spot
guide.step2.description.mobile: You can also long-press anywhere on the map to quickly add photos to that spot
guide.step3.title: Fragment Mode
guide.step3.description: Tap the globe button to enter Fragment Mode — your photos fill country shapes on a world map, giving you a bird's-eye view of everywhere you've been
pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.description: Unlock premium templates and AI features
